---
date: '2019-11-11T18:05:48+00:00'
favorite: false
feature_image: ''
format: markdown
slug: 2019-so-far
tags: []
title: 2019 So Far
---

last update was january, and it hurt going through 9 months of pictures seeing how much littler they were only a short while ago :(

twins turned 2 in march: no more pacifiers, full mouths of teeth, speaking in sentences, and can just about dress themselves now... they fight half the time, and love on each other the other half--it's so much fun to watch them grow up together

my babygirl isn't a baby anymore: turned 7 in august, lost both her front teeth, reads chapter books, is getting into fishing, went to her first security conference with me, and made the gymnastics team!

disney on ice, pumpkin patches, sullivan's island, school pictures, birthdays and birthday parties, bathtime, bike rides, popsicles, playgrounds... these girls are amazing <3
